rows.label: qev092710_MSG0020
rows.name:
Not long now. They'll be announcing
Hraesvelg's mass production soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0030
rows.name:
This model's really a cut above. Can't
wait for you to give it a spin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0045
rows.name: This isn't public knowledge yet, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0050
rows.name:
It's fitted with a special system.
Hraesvelg will blow other Dolls
right out of the water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0060
rows.name:
It's still in development, but
it really will wow the pants
off of you. Watch this space![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0080
rows.name:
Anytime you need a little
extra help, give me a call.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0090
rows.name:
I happen to be a pretty competent
pilot. That might be a skill
you're in the market for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0100
rows.name:
Before Grenada, Liesel was air
force, and quite the rising star.
She made instructor in record time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0110
rows.name:
I'd argue that she might even
give the legendary hero Alois
Bernholt a run for his money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0120
rows.name:
Okay now... That's laying
it on a bit thick.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0130
rows.name:
In any case, I reckon we'd make
a pretty decent team in battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092710_MSG0140
rows.name:
After all, everyone could
use an ace up their sleeve![ST:wait ]
